offer: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 daily routes, route deviations cause late deliveries. We generate daily delivery route deviation alerts instead of manual tracking of delivery routes.
problem: Route deviations lead to late deliveries and increased operational costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for logistics tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try daily alert notifications on 1-3 routes
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the solution
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick use
Set default reminder schedules for alerts
Allow CSV import for existing route data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
